title: CardGPT Development Progress Summary
summary: Point-in-time development log (dated 2026-01-21) recording completed CardGPT phases, ticket status, technical decisions, and planned next steps.
scope: card data schema and cards.json (10 HK cards, 36 reward rules)
notes: HISTORICAL SNAPSHOT — dated 2026-01-21, ~6 months stale as of ingest. Every state claim (phase completion, 12/17 tickets = 71%, file line counts, git commit SHAs ee47240/91c95d2/5af655a etc., 27 commits, 'THI-18 next') describes the repo AT THAT DATE, not current state. Downstream consumers must verify against git log / filesystem before treating any claim as current. Contains a 'Technical Decisions' section (priority+cumulative rewards, monthly caps, no backend for MVP, TS strict mode, Tailwind v4) with ADR-like rationale, but these are retrospective summaries in a progress log, not standalone ADRs with status fields — decisions here are UNVERIFIED context, not locked. Manifest declared DOC with precedence 15; classification honors manifest without heuristic override. Content signals independently agree: prose/log structure, no user stories, no API contracts, no ADR status markers.
